content.full_text:
February 28, 1991

Mr. Wayne Imberi  
Political Reform Consultant  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street, Suite 610  
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Mr. Imberi:

I have set up a "Henry J. Mello Foundation", a non-profit corporation, "501 C 3", certified by the Internal Revenue Service, to be used for charitable purposes, and currently valued at $100,000. Campaign funds have been put into this foundation. Neither I nor members of my family can benefit any way financially from any Foundation funds.

Per our telephone conversation today, I am requesting a written opinion, confirming your oral opinion, from FPPC stating that I am not required to report the "Henry J. Mello Foundation" on my Form 721, Statement of Economic Interests.

Thank you very much for looking into this matter for me. I am looking forward to receiving your written opinion.

Sincerely,

HENRY J. MELLO

HJM:mam
